entries.description: An invite-only tournament celebrating the Crystal Storm expansion's rarest pulls.
entries.announcement_text: Crystal Storm Invitational announced — singles demand rising
entries.active_text: Crystal Storm Invitational underway — singles cards flying off shelves!

entries.active_text: Dark Masters Cup active — tournament players clearing your singles shelf!
